eventName: Arnab Kishor Bordoloi Young Technovator Competition 2021
description: Roboworld launches its most prestigious annual Event Arnab Kishor Bordoloi Young Technovator Competition on 9th of September in the loving memory of our beloved alumini Arnab Kishor Bordoloi on the ocassion of his death anniversary.
